title: No license file
description: Repository has no LICENSE file. All rights reserved by default — 9,260 forks technically have no legal right to use the code.
recommendation: Add MIT/Apache-2.0 license. This is the #1 blocker for any adoption.

title: No security features enabled
description: Dependabot, code scanning, secret scanning all disabled. No branch protection rules. No SECURITY.md.
recommendation: Enable Dependabot, CodeQL scanning, branch protection on master.

title: Bus factor = 1
description: 8 contributors but commit history dominated by Karpathy. Single point of failure for maintenance.
recommendation: Community governance model if project grows beyond personal experiment.

title: CI always fails
description: 20 'Copilot code review' workflow runs, all failures. No actual CI/CD pipeline (tests, lint, build).
recommendation: Add basic CI: pytest, ruff lint, type checking.

title: Deliberate minimalism
description: 3-file architecture (prepare.py, train.py, program.md) is intentional design choice for AI agent experimentation.

title: Security Facade absence pattern
description: Review workflow creates appearance of CI infrastructure without functional value.
recommendation: Either fix the workflow or remove it.
